final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for the brand "RAN QIU".

Style/medium: needs an "东方美学" (Eastern aesthetics) with "极简主义" (minimalist) and "自然诗意" (natural poetic) aesthetic — references in the spirit of 宋画 ink-wash tradition, 原研哉 / MUJI brand identity heritage, wabi-sabi visual philosophy; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include generous white space as a core design element
Subject: must include the "RAN QIU" brand mark as the central focal element
Scene/backdrop: needs a warm autumn atmosphere with natural elements — exact seasonal staging is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a "金色时光" (golden hour) atmosphere with shallow depth of field feel — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must include #8B3A1E (deep autumn brown-red), #E8DCCB (beige), #D4A574 (golden brown) — exact hex ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a warm and healing surface treatment — exact grain / sheen is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must preserve generous white space, warm autumn mood, poetic and serene visual experience
Avoid:
